title: Solar's Enchantments
description: Adds 21 new enchantments to the game!!
body:
Adds 21 new enchantments to the game!!
> CurseForge port: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/solars-enchantments

**ALL ENCHANTMENTS:**

**Blast Miner (I - V)**

Blast Miner does exactly what it sounds like – when you mine a block, an explosion occurs. The higher the level, the bigger the explosion (level 5 = massive – do not use it next to precious areas, you will probably lose it). There will be a brief immunity period a few ticks before the explosion so you don’t die.



**Bouncing Aspect (I - II)**

Similar to Fire Aspect, but with the Jump Boost effect. Hitting an enemy causes them to jump higher, with the effect duration and strength increasing per level. This is incompatible with other Aspect enchantments.



**Curse of Diminishing**

If an armor piece has this curse, your health will slowly diminish until you die (unless you take it off).



**Curse of Eternal Flame**

If an armor piece has this curse, you will constantly be set ablaze until you take it off.



**Curse of Silence**

If an armor piece has this curse, all potion effects – good and bad – will be removed, rendering Golden Apples basically useless.



**Curse of the Anchor**

If an armor piece has this curse, you’ll be unable to sprint.



**Curse of the Heartless**

Permanently sets your health to half a heart...
...you have to be really unlucky to get this.



**Fire Thorns**

Basically like Thorns, but deals fire damage instead.



**Floating Aspect (I - II)**

Similar to Fire Aspect, but with the Levitation effect. Hitting an enemy causes them to float upward, with the effect duration and strength increasing per level. This is incompatible with other Aspect enchantments.



**Invincibility**

Basically Protection IV with a massive buff – reduces all incoming damage by 1024 – meaning you can jump from the surface to deepslate level and live!!
i– i think–
i forgot–



**Lightning Aspect (I - II)**

Upon hitting an entity, a wave of lightning strikes the ground, hitting (potentially) multiple targets with a single hit.



**Lucky Hearts**

When you're attacked and an armor piece has this enchantment, you have a 5% chance to get 50 HEARTS for one minute!
However, there is also a 5% chance that when you have these extra hearts, they can be taken away if you are attacked during the minute that you have them.



**Moonlit Blessing**

If you can see the sky at night, there's a 5% chance to regenerate health!



**Poison Aspect (I - II)**

Similar to Fire Aspect, but with the Poison effect. Hitting an enemy causes them to suffer poison, with the effect duration and strength increasing per level. This is incompatible with other Aspect enchantments.

**Smelting Touch**

Upon mining a block, it will give you its smelted form. For example:
Stone = Smooth Stone
Cobbled Deepslate = Deepslate
Block of Raw Iron = Block of Iron
…etc. This is incompatible with Silk Touch.



**Speed Miner (I - III)**

If a tool has this enchantment, you will get Haste. The level of Haste increases per level.



**Stride**

When you're attacked, you have a 5% chance to get Speed III to get away from enemies.



**Sunlit Blessing**

If you can see the sky in the daytime, there's a 5% chance to regenerate health!



**Weakening Aspect (I - II)**

Similar to Fire Aspect, but with the Weakness effect. Hitting an enemy causes them to deal less damage, with the effect duration and strength increasing per level. This is incompatible with other Aspect enchantments.



**Wither Aspect (I - II)**

Basically like Fire Aspect, but with the Wither effect. The length and strength of the effect increases per level. This is incompatible with other Aspect enchantments.



**XP Dropper (I - IV)**

With this enchantment, you have a chance to get XP from every block you break!!

> Note: All Aspect enchantments (Wither, Floating, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Weakening, and Bouncing) are incompatible with each other to maintain balance.
> 
> This mod was made with MCreator!!
> You can use this in your modpack. Give credit if you want, but I don’t mind.
> 
> This is my first publicly released mod.
> 
> If there’s anything you want me to add/improve on, let me know! :)
> 
> I am only limited to the versions MCreator supports, but I’ll try to port this mod to as many versions as I can!!
